# Optima Safety Solutions

> Professional safety nets and invisible grills installation company serving Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India.

## About

Optima Safety Solutions is a certified safety solutions provider specializing in:
- Balcony safety nets for children and pet protection
- Invisible grills (SS316 marine-grade stainless steel cable grills)
- Pigeon and bird exclusion netting
- Ceiling and balcony cloth hangers (pulley drying systems)
- Construction safety nets and sports nets

Phone: +91 78937 60933
Email: optimasafetysolutions77@gmail.com
Location: Choolaimedu, Chennai - 600094, Tamil Nadu, India
Service area: All major Chennai localities
